    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CourseStaff>
    CourseStaffRepository.findAllByEmail(String email)
    This method returns a CourseStaff entity with a given email.
    Iterable<CourseStaff>
    CourseStaffRepository.findByCourseId(Long courseId)
    This method returns a list of CourseStaff entities associated with a given course ID.
    Optional<CourseStaff>
    CourseStaffRepository.findByEmailAndCourse(String email, Course course)
    This method returns a CourseStaff entity with a given email and course.
